panels.title: Comfort Score
panels.description: % of readings in last 24h where temperature is 20-24C AND humidity is 40-60%

targets.query:
total = from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> count()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

comfort = from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.temperature >= 20.0 and r.temperature <= 24.0 and r.humidity >= 40.0 and r.humidity <= 60.0)
  |> count(column: "temperature")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: comfort.temperature) / float(v: total._value) * 100.0}))

panels.title: Avg Temperature (24h)
panels.description: Mean indoor temperature over the last 24 hours

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> mean()

panels.title: Mold Risk Hours
panels.description: Hours in the last 24h where indoor humidity exceeded 60%

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 60.0)
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 60.0}))

panels.title: Heating Efficiency
panels.description: Average indoor-outdoor temperature delta over 24h. Higher = better insulation.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "climate_delta")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature_delta")
  |> mean()

panels.title: Daily Temperature Range
panels.description: Daily min, mean, and max indoor temperature over 7 days

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: min, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Comfort Zone Tracking
panels.description: Indoor temperature with comfort zone (20-24C) highlighted

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Humidity Trend (7 days)
panels.description: Indoor humidity over 7 days. Comfort zone is 40-60%. Above 60% increases mold risk.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "indoor_climate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
